title: Computationally Efficient Methods for Invariant Feature Selection with Sparsity
excerpt: Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM) proposes an optimization scheme that uses causal features to improve generalization, and this work studies sparse and computationally efficient methods for invariant feature recovery.
citation: Du, J., and Banerjee, A. (2025). Computationally Efficient Methods for Invariant Feature Selection with Sparsity.

title: Tracking the Hidden Trade of Non-native Pet Amphibians in the United States
excerpt: This paper investigates the hidden trade of non-native pet amphibians in the United States.
citation: Edmonds, D., Du, J., Stickley, S., and Sucre, S. (2026). Tracking the Hidden Trade of Non-native Pet Amphibians in the United States. Biological Conservation.

title: Self-Navigating Robots Use BLE
excerpt: Self-navigating robots using Bluetooth signal strength to determine distance.
citation: Du, Jane and Glueck, Jacob (2018). Self-Navigating Robots Use BLE. Circuit Cellar. 1(1).
